title: Ultimate Car Mod-Custom Models Pack
description: A resource pack to make Ultimate Car Mod cars less blocky.
body:
A resource pack for Ultimate Car Mod That makes the cars less blocky.

![An image comparing the resource pack-less version, and the resource pack version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5249a59b9990b0e77e713ae523f6521e046fd039.png)

This Resource pack eplaces the car models with custom models, and also makes a few changes to item graphics.



**This is a Resource Pack! it requires Ultimate Car Mod To Function!**

the models might break on first applying, try restarting the game.
if you have another resource pack(such as Adelink's ultimate Car textures) installed, you will need to un-apply that pack, and apply this pack, for it to function. same for the opposite direction.
